prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the S58B30T0 engine featuring a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, paired with a CSF Racing S58-specific intercooler (part #CSF-8215) and custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe by FTP Motorsport (catless or GESI catted option)

Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom S58 calibration by Dimsport (Italy), including flex-fuel ethanol mapping, launch control (3,500 RPM flat shift), and anti-lag system with 2-step rev limiter (8,500 RPM redline), paired with a Plex Tuning S-Display for real-time data logging

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension kit (part #BMW-001) with 3-way adjustable dampers, 24-way rebound/compression adjustment, and custom spring rates (8K front / 10K rear), paired with H&R S58-specific sway bars (25mm front / 22mm rear) and AKG Motorsport monoball subframe bushings (part #AKG-30-0201)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for X3 M (F97 chassis) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper canards, and rear diffuser, finished in BMW Frozen Portimao Blue (paint code 354) with custom matte clear coat by Sprayline (Germany)

Vorsteiner V-FF 109 forged 21x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x12 ET45 (rear) wheels in gloss black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/21 front, 305/25/21 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake kit (part #CP9660-2050) with 400mm rotors and titanium caliper pistons

Custom carbon fiber engine cover by 3D Carbon (USA) with exposed S58 engine bay detailing, including a custom titanium strut brace by FTP Motorsport, and a full Akrapovic Evolution exhaust system with carbon fiber tips and electronic valve control (part #EVO-BMW-X3M-19)
